item.title: Nas Docker Rss Subscription Service
item.description: For me, Freshrss is better. I plan to test them one by one, but stop at Freshrss as I’m satisfied with it. Planned testing sequence in order: Miniflux -> Freshrss -> Tiny tiny rss My requirement: Subscribe > 100 feeds Use on PC & mobile Feeds are manageable (feeds with error, remove feeds) Comparison: Miniflux can suscribe >100 feeds Easy to use on both PC & mobile Freshrss can subscribe >100 feeds Easy to use on both PC & mobile Better subscription mangement (e.

item.title: Journey
item.description: 2023 27 Aug - 30 Aug Ethernaut 1-9 31 Aug - 1 Sep Do nothing 2 Sep Back to Ethernaut (actually do nth, just take a look….) 3 Sep - 4 Sep Do nth 5 Sep Back to Ethernaut (King….) 10 Sep Ethernaut (Reentrance) 14 Sep Ethernaut (Elevator) 21 Sep Ethernaut (Privacy)

item.title: About
item.description: ce1evenn Log sth Learn sth Do sth Earn a living

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: For blogging security relates stuff (GitPage + Hugo) Reason for blogging A trigger to do sth (as I need to write sth on the blog) Making progress Goal-driven Conscious Reason for Hugo Easier to setup (compiled binary is provided) Theme (Hexo & Hugo) hexo Cactus hugo YinYang Poison
